scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.cap:sync: node tools/bump-version.js && npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run build:admin && node tools/cap-admin-sync.js
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.git:push: git add . && git commit -m "update" && git push
